description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a sleek, rectangular layout. The exterior features large floor-to-ceiling windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, allowing for ample natural light. A spacious deck area extends from the main structure, including a swimming pool, hot tub, and a driveway with a parked car. The building is finished in a combination of white and dark gray materials, giving it a contemporary appearance. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as multiple bedrooms and bathrooms. The property is surrounded by low fencing, enhancing privacy while maintaining an open, urban feel.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a spacious deck, pool, and open-plan interior, finished in white and dark gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bungalow, the pool, deck, carport, and extensive window arrangements.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the open-plan interior, visible living spaces, and the pool area at the rear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the long facade with large windows and the pool area extending from the main structure.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the deck, pool, carport, and the back entrance to the bungalow.
